one_liner: ClickUp is a project management platform with a broad REST API (v2/v3) supporting personal API tokens or OAuth2 for building integrations.

auth_methods.notes: Personal API token (pk_...) passed directly in Authorization header, generated self-serve from account settings; never expires.
Authorization Code grant flow for third-party apps acting on behalf of other users; requires creating an OAuth app (Workspace owner/admin) to get client_id/secret.

self_serve_notes: API access is available on the Free Forever plan; personal tokens can be generated instantly from account settings without manual approval. OAuth app creation requires Workspace owner/admin role. Rate limits and some endpoints vary by plan (e.g., 100 req/min on Free plan).

api_surface.notes: REST API v2 (with some v3 endpoints) covering tasks, docs, goals, custom fields, time tracking, chat, and more; OpenAPI spec published.

evidence.supports: Describes personal API token and OAuth2 authorization code flow, header usage.
Confirms API v2/v3 REST surface, authentication requirement, rate limits by plan.
Confirms API is available across plans including Free Forever, with variations.
Details on creating OAuth apps and self-serve token generation.

flags: Multiple community-built MCP servers exist (taazkareem, helbertparanhos, Kirra01, Nazruden, bravoure) but no official ClickUp-maintained MCP server confirmed.
API endpoint/rate-limit availability varies by Workspace plan tier.
